meta.name: Ashes Before Dawn
meta.description: Set in a rugged Old West landscape where the law is written in gunpowder and desire, dangerous secrets begin to surface long before sundown. Ashes Before Dawn follows a group of cowboys and outlaws—led by Sir Peter and Paddy O'Brian—who find themselves in an isolated town where tensions rise as alliances are tested and forbidden passions are ignited under the scorching desert sun. Between duty and temptation, they will discover that some ashes never truly cool down.
